text: Good morning, Memphis. It is Saturday. I am already in the studio. Grateful for the quiet before the signal goes live. Tune in at 7 on WGSP 1490 AM. #MorningReflections
Today on Morning Reflections we are talking about grief that nobody sees - the kind you carry to work and back home again. We have Rev. Angela Dawson joining us at 7:30. WGSP 1490 AM. #GriefAndFaith
@morningreflectionsrebecca So honored to be on the show this morning. That conversation about invisible grief needed to happen. Thank you for the space, Rebecca.
Our community health fair at Grace Community Church is October 3. Free screenings, resources, and community. Deacon Mosley and I have been planning this for months. Come out. #MemphisHealth
Mark your calendars - annual community health fair is coming October 3! Free health screenings, prayer, and fellowship. Hosted with our own Sister Rebecca Price. All are welcome. #GraceMemphis
Chaplaincy is not fixing. It is being present when fixing is not possible. That truth changes everything about how I show up at work.
CPE continuing education deadline is Dec 31. Board certified chaplains: log your hours now so the end of the year is not a scramble. #ChaplainCare #CPE
@assoc_prof_chaplains Already on it. 28 of my 50 hours logged. The second half of the year fills up fast. Thank you for the reminder. #CPE
This Saturday on Morning Reflections: @morningreflectionsrebecca welcomes a conversation on caregivers who need care. 7 AM on WGSP 1490 AM. Do not miss it.
New piece: When hospitals get quiet - how chaplains hold space in the hardest hours. A must-read for anyone in clinical ministry. Link in bio. #Chaplaincy #FaithInAction
This @sojournersmag piece is exactly right. Presence is its own ministry. Sharing with my team at Bluff City tomorrow.
Saturday brunch tradition with my girl @morningreflectionsrebecca after the show. Cafe Eclectic never misses. You earned that plate, sis. #CooperYoung
Reminder: this Sunday is the Advent dawn service at Grace Community. I will be delivering the meditation as first light comes. Bring a blanket and a willing heart. #Advent2025
Morning Reflections turns 7 years old this spring. What started as a quiet experiment on Saturday mornings has grown into something I cannot fully explain. Grateful beyond words. #WGSP1490
@morningreflectionsrebecca Seven years and still the best two hours of my Saturday. Congratulations, Rebecca.
Memphis spotlight: @morningreflectionsrebecca on the intersection of faith, medicine, and community care. Full Q&A this week at memphis-tribune.com. #MemphisVoices
Thank you @memphis_tribune for this feature. Grateful to have a publication that covers the stories this city needs to hear.
New issue of Faith and Practice Journal is out - featuring a roundtable on compassion fatigue among clinical chaplains. Available now. #Chaplaincy #ClinicalPastoral
Bluff City Medical Center congratulates our Pastoral Care team on another year of excellence. We are proud to serve Memphis with compassion at every bedside. #BluffCityStrong
So grateful to be part of this team. Dr. Vickers leads us with wisdom and grace every single day. Proud to serve at Bluff City Medical Center. #BluffCityStrong
